title: fix bug checkIfFileExists
body:
close #4383 
fix checkIfFileExists returns true only if stats path success and path is not a directory.
replace os.IsNotExist(err) with err != nil check because if name is a file , stat name/Containerfile or name/Dockerfile will retunr not a directory error. os.IsNotExist(err) can not catch this error.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *QiWang19* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

This isn't quite right.  The issue is if the command is `podman build file` called from /tmp, it sets the internal containerfiles variable to `/tmp/file/Containerfile`.  The changes in utils.go are not necessary, how we handle the file/directory in containerfiles does need to change.  Lookin at that now.
@TomSweeneyRedHat has replaced this PR, lets concentrate there.
